positive: A stylized, minimalist mountain range silhouette at sunset, forming a powerful graphic design element. The mountains are rendered in deep indigo and charcoal gray, contrasted sharply against a vibrant gradient sky of warm coral, soft lavender, and bright gold. Above the mountain peak, a crescent moon and a few small, stylized geometric stars are visible. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, featuring negative space that emphasizes the sharp contrast. The print style should mimic clean vector line art mixed with solid color blocking, suitable for screen printing on fabric. High contrast, clean edges, symmetry, epic scale.
